S.O. (E),- Inexerciseofthepowersconferredbysection4ofthelnsecticidesAct, 1968(46of 1968),the Central Government hereby makes the following further amendments in the notification of the Government of lndia in the erstwhile Ministry of Food, Agriculture, Community Development and Cooperation, published in Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part ll, Section 3, Sub-section (i), number G.S.R.301, dated the 27th February, L971-, namely:- In the said notification, for item (xv) and the entries relating thereto, the following item and entries shall be substituted, namely: - "(xv) Dr. Veena Verma, Director, Professor, (For a period clf three years from the Department of Pharmacology, Safdarjung Hospital, date of publication of this New Delhi. notification)". IF.No. 19-612008-PP-l (vol. ll)] $#(Ashwani Kumar) Joint Secretary to the Government of India Note: The principal notification was published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part ll, Section 3, Sub- section (i), vide number G.S.R. 301, dated the 27th February,l97I and last amended vide number S.O' 2798(E), dated 22"d August, 2017. -- 2 of 2 --
